title: Evaluate a k-means k-sweep
summary: Score every solution produced by the kmeans_demo run.
oce_text:
[["clustering::evaluate"]]
input = "./data/respondents.csv"
vars = ["q1", "q2", "q3", "q4"]
solutions = ["kmeans_demo_kmeans_k2", "kmeans_demo_kmeans_k3", "kmeans_demo_kmeans_k4", "kmeans_demo_kmeans_k5"]
run_dir = "./runs"
run_name = "kmeans_demo"
metric = "euclidean"
na_action = "complete_cases"
headers = true

title: Evaluate three methods at k=3
summary: Compare quality of kmeans / hier / kmedoids at a fixed k.
oce_text:
[["clustering::evaluate"]]
input = "./data/respondents.csv"
vars = ["q1", "q2", "q3", "q4"]
solutions = ["multi_demo_kmeans_k3", "multi_demo_hier_k3", "multi_demo_kmedoids_k3"]
run_dir = "./runs"
run_name = "multi_demo"
metric = "euclidean"
